programme.title: Viva Ceol Tíre
programme.desc: Sraith ina ndéantar taifeadadh ar fhíseáin cheoil ar fud na hÉireann. (This series showcases the 32 counties of Ireland through country music videos all shot on location.)

programme.desc: Leanfaidh Cormac lena thuras i Sléibhte Mhuintir Luinigh in Ulaidh. (Cormac examines the rich Irish language heritage of the Muintir Luinigh area in Ulster.)

programme.title: 7LÁ

programme.title: Scéal an Lae
programme.desc: Is é Seán Mistéil a bheidh ag léamh scéal an lae inniu. (Today's story of the day is read by Seán Mistéil.)

programme.title: CoComelon It's Cody Time
programme.desc: Breathnaigh thart, breathnaigh thart, céard atá ann? (Look around, look around, what is there to find?)

programme.title: CoComelon JJ's Animal
programme.desc: Is breá leis an triúr seo ceol a sheinm a chéile. (There are 3 little friends and their favourite thing to do is play music instruments together.)

programme.title: Blocdhathanna
programme.desc: Bíonn an-spraoi ag na Dathanna ag maisiú rudaí. (The Colours have lots of fun decorating today.)

programme.title: Bíp Bíp Cory Carson
programme.desc: Faigheann Héilí amach go dtaitníonn sé léi cúnamh a thabhairt do dhaoine. (Halle finds out that she quite enjoys offering people a helping hand.)

programme.title: Garáiste Gecko
programme.desc: Téann Gecko agus Mamó ar thuras gluaisrothair inniu. (Gecko and Mamó go for a motorcycle ride today.)

programme.title: Elmo Anseo
programme.desc: Ag foghlaim faoi phátrúin a bheidh Elmo inniu. (Elmo is learning all about patterns today.)

programme.title: Pip & Posy
programme.desc: Casann Posy amhrán do Pip ar an ucailéile agus baineann sé féin triail as. (When Posy shows Pip her tune on the ukulele, he has a go and finds it easy.)

programme.title: Olobob Top
programme.desc: Tá bus nua ag Cnag agus tá sí ag tabhairt bealach timpeall na foraoise do gach uile dhuine. (Crunch is driving everyone around the forest in a bus.)

programme.title: PJ Masks
programme.desc: Cuireann Owlette misean i mbaol agus cailleann sí a cuimhne dá bharr. (Owlette imperils a mission and loses her memory as a result.)

programme.title: Wussywat
programme.desc: Tá cara le Wussywat i bpoll. Ach cé acu meas tú? (A friend of Wussywat is in a hole. But which one?)

programme.title: Clifford
programme.desc: Cuirtear fios ar ghabhair chun na fiailí a ithe ar Fheirm Birdwell. (Goats are called in to tame the weeds on Birdwell Farm.)

programme.title: Woozle & Pip
programme.desc: Baineann Woozle néal amach mar go bhfuil sé tinn. Bíonn brionglóid iontach aige. (Woozle takes a nap when he's feeling poorly... and what a dream he has!)

programme.title: Vegesaurs
programme.desc: Tá Mandairínteiric ag déanamh praiseach den áit! (A Mandarinteryx has moved into home base and is causing a big mess.)

programme.desc: Tá smaoineamh iontach ag Ella ar lá te. Déanann sí líomanáid dá cuid cairde go léir. (Ella has a great idea on a hot day. She makes lemonade for her friends.)

programme.desc: Ceol traidisiúnta ón Iarthar á chur i láthair ag PJ Ó hIarnáin agus Dearbhaill Standún. (Traditional music from the West. Presented by PJ Ó hIarnáin and Dearbhaill Standún.)

programme.title: Murder She Wrote
programme.desc: Bíonn drochthús ag turas Jessica go New Orleans nuair a mharaítear duine de bhanna snagcheoil ar stáitse. (The leader of a popular jazz band is poisoned during a performance.)

programme.title: An Deis
programme.desc: Tugann trí fhoireann aghaidh ar a chéile chun an pota óir a bhuachan. Seó cluichí á chur i láthair ag Eibhlín Ní Chonghaile. (Gameshow in which 3 teams compete to win the jackpot.)

programme.title: Réabhlóid ar Chúl an Tí
programme.desc: Is i nDún na nGall a bheifear sa gclár seo, áit a réiteofar gairdín Des agus Eimear. (We see a garden in Donegal transform by replacing endless grass with native plants.)

programme.title: Grand Tours of Scotland's Lochs
programme.desc: Téann Paul ar thuras mórthimpeall inbhir Easter Ross agus Sutherland. (Paul travels around the Firths of Easter Ross and Sutherland.)

programme.title: Glór Tíre - Rogha & Togha
programme.desc: Beidh Hugo Duncan agus Fiona Regan ag gabháil fhoinn ar chlár inniu. (Hugo Duncan sings in this episode of Glór Tíre, also featuring Fiona Regan.)

programme.title: The Gilmore Girls
programme.desc: Insíonn Paris don phobal go bhfuil Lorelai agus Max, múinteoir Rory, ag dul in éineacht agus bíonn sé ina raic. Paris exposes the relationship between Lorelai and Rory's teacher, Max.

programme.title: An Aimsir Láithreach
programme.desc: Aimsir réigiúnach agus náisiúnta. (National and regional weather.)

programme.title: Malcolm in the Middle
programme.desc: Spreagann Hal foireann sacair Dewey fad a bhíonn Malcolm ag tabhairt aghaidh ar chlár ríomhaireachta. (Hal invigorates Dewey's soccer team as Malcolm battles a computer program.)

programme.title: Nuacht Cúla4
programme.desc: Clár nuachta do dhaoine óga ina gclúdaítear scéalta áitiúla, náisiúnta agus idirnáisiúnta. (News programme for young people covering local, national and international news.)

programme.title: Siar Linn
programme.desc: Rachfar siar go haimsir na bPéindlíthe sa gclár seo. (This week, we're in the era of The Penal Laws.)

programme.title: Bailte
programme.desc: Tá Leitreach Ard suite ar an gcósta thiar de leithinis Iorras Aithneach i gConamara. (Síle visits the coastal village of Leitreach Ard in Carna, Conamara.)

programme.title: An Aimsir Láithreach
programme.desc: Aimsir réigiúnach agus náisiúnta. (National and regional weather.)

programme.title: Nuacht TG4
programme.desc: Mórimeachtaí an lae ó Aonad Nuachta TG4. (The day's main news stories from a regional, national and international perspective.)

programme.title: Slé Anois go Cúramach
programme.desc: Beidh Meánscoil na nUrsulach ag tabhairt aghaidh ar Choláiste Naomh Mac Cairthinn sa gclár seo. (In this episode Ursuline Secondary School face St Macartan's College.)

programme.title: 7LÁ
programme.desc: Clár cúrsaí reatha seachtainiúil TG4. Déanfar scagadh agus plé ar scéalta nuachta. (Politics and the economy, regional, national and international affairs.)

programme.title: Ros na Rún
programme.desc: Dúisíonn Penny ar deireadh ach bíonn deacrachtaí aici lena súile. (Penny is finally awake but she's having some trouble with her vision.)

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Téann Frasier ag seilg le dream an bheáir nuair a chuireann Diane brú orthu cuireadh a thabhairt dó. (The guys take Frasier hunting after Diane insists that they include him.)

programme.title: Viva Ceol Tíre
programme.desc: Beidh Mick Flavin, The Ward Sisters, Jack Keogh, Shane Duggan, Effie Neill agus Nathan Carter ar an gclár. (This episode features Mick Flavin, the Ward Sisters and Nathan Carter.)

programme.title: Glór Tíre - Rogha & Togha
programme.desc: Rogha amhrán ó shraith a 17 de Ghlór Tíre. (Featuring The Sheerin Family, Cliona Hagan, Michael English, Mike Denver, Louise Morrissey & Robert Mizzell.)

programme.title: Sunny Nights
programme.desc: Tá Mony fós ag fiosrú faoi dhúnmharú a dearthár agus bíonn Martin ag iarraidh cur isteach uirthi. (Martin races against time to divert Mony's investigation.)

programme.title: An Aimsir Láithreach
programme.desc: Aimsir réigiúnach agus náisiúnta. (National and regional weather.)

programme.title: Ros na Rún
programme.desc: Dúisíonn Penny ar deireadh ach bíonn deacrachtaí aici lena súile. (Penny is finally awake but she's having some trouble with her vision.)

programme.title: Fíorscéal
programme.desc: Clár faisnéise faoi sheadáin. Is minic le dúil bheo teacht i dtír ar dhúil bheo eile! (Documentary looking at parasites. Living things love to exploit living things!)

programme.title: Marú inár Measc
programme.desc: Scéal Daniel McAnaspie,17, a dúnmharaíodh in 2010. (The murder of Daniel McAnaspie who became the first known child to be murdered while under the care of the HSE.)
